title: Head-to-head: 3D Gaussian Splatting vs Instant-NGP
stumbles: wiki_page call with both node_id AND a `name` argument naming 'Nerfacto' returned 'node not found'; the agent recognised the mistake (mixed call shape + Nerfacto is not a separate corpus node) and proceeded with the data already gathered.
summary: Compared 3DGS and Instant-NGP head-to-head on Mip-NeRF 360 outdoor average. Pulled both wiki pages, used search_facts for the shared numeric metrics (PSNR/SSIM/FPS/train time), and used node_context to enumerate variants on each side. Returned an 8-row comparison matrix plus a one-paragraph 'use this when' guidance: 3DGS for sharp interactive rendering on benign captures; Instant-NGP for non-radiance tasks, faster initial convergence, or fixed memory.
